mapper.select: SELECT p_email FROM patient WHERE p_phone = #{phone} AND p_state = 1 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM patient WHERE p_phone = #{phone} AND p_state = 1 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM patient WHERE p_email = #{email} AND p_state = 1 LIMIT 1
SELECT p_id FROM patient WHERE p_phone = #{phone} AND p_state = 1 LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM patient WHERE p_phone = #{phone} AND p_state = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM patient WHERE p_email = #{email} AND p_state = 1
SELECT p_phone, p_email FROM patient WHERE p_email IS NOT NULL AND p_state = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM patient WHERE p_email IS NOT NULL AND p_state = 1
SELECT p_phone FROM patient WHERE p_email = #{email} AND p_state = 1 LIMIT 1
